name: Cambala Investigation Agency
overview: Cambala Investigation Agency,and called Cambala Files in Pakistan and Bangladesh is a television series broadcast on Indian television station Pogo TV. The C.I.A. consists of five children who live in a fictitious town called Cambala and solve numerous crimes. Each of the five kids also have their own special talent. They generally solve cases before the town's police inspector, D. L.'The Speedbreaker' Kulkarni.
